channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers LARPs at a Renaissance Faire in Video for New Song “Lost Boys”: Watch
item.description: 🎶 Tune in for some whimsical vibes as @phoebe_bridgers brings fantasy to life in her latest music video! 🏰✨ #LostBoys #MusicNews

item.title: Rick Rubin-Helmed Jay-Z Docuseries Coming to HBO
item.description: 🎵 Get ready to dive deep into Jay-Z's world with a new docuseries produced by the legendary Rick Rubin on HBO! 🙌📺 #JayZ #RickRubin #HBO

item.title: Erykah Badu Is Going on Tour With the Alchemist
item.description: 🌟 Get ready for some soulful vibes! Erykah Badu is hitting the road with The Alchemist! 🎶 #SoulfulSounds #TourAlert

item.title: The Rolling Stones Share New Song With The Cure’s Robert Smith
item.description: 🎸 Rock legends collide! The Rolling Stones team up with The Cure's Robert Smith for an epic new tune! 🔥 #MusicNews #LegendsUnite 🤘

item.title: Blondshell Announces New Album Violins: Hear The Title Track
item.description: 🚀 Blondshell is back with "Violins"! 🎻 Get ready for an epic musical journey! 🎶 #NewMusic #BlondshellViolins 🎵
